channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: Bates 'one of the most important and controversial figures in Chelsea history'
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Sky Sports' Kaveh Solhekol pays homage to Ken Bates and his dedication to Chelsea.

item.title: Britain's Patten wins second Wimbledon doubles title and hits out at proposed cuts
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Britain's Henry Patten and Finland's Harri Heliovaara won their second Wimbledon men's doubles title with a straight-sets victory.

item.title: South Africa World Cup midfielder Adams dies aged 25
item.dc:creator: BBC Sport Football
item.description: South Africa and Mamelodi Sundowns midfielder Jayden Adams dies at the age of 25, just weeks after featuring for his country at the World Cup.

item.title: Makinde Promises Medical Care During Visit to Rescued Oriire Kidnap Victim
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: Oyo State Governor, Seyi Makinde, on Saturday visited the pupils and teachers rescued from captivity after their abduction in Oriire Local Government Area, assuring that they would receive comprehensive medical and psychological care before reuniting with their families. The governor spoke after vis

item.title: Kwara PDP Hails Rescue Of Oyo School Children, Teachers
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: Slams Gov AbdulRazaq’s nonchalance on rescue of 179 Woro abductees The Kwara State Chapter of the People’s Democratic Party (PDP) has congratulated the Government and people of Oyo State on the successful rescue of the 49 abducted school children and teachers, who regained their freedom

item.title: Ryu shoots lowest-ever round in a major at Evian Championship
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Haeran Ryu shot the lowest round in major championship history at the Amundi Evian Championship, carding 60 on Saturday to soar into a three-shot lead heading into the final round.

item.title: 2027: LP settles for Hajja Konto as VP candidate
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: The Labour Party (LP) has chosen healthcare professional Hajja Bintu Konto as its vice presidential candidate for the 2027 general election The post 2027: LP settles for Hajja Konto as VP candidate appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.title: Keyamo Directs FAAN To Fine Obi N25,000 For Wrongful Parking At Airport
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: Festus Keyamo, the Minister of Aviation and Aerospace Development, has directed the Federal Airport Authority of Nigeria (FAAN) to charge the Presidential candidate of the Nigeria Democratic Congress (NDC) in the 2027 general elections, Peter Obi, N25,000 for wrongful parking at the Abuja airport. T

item.title: Okpebholo Hails Peaceful Edo LG Polls As Voters Turn Out Massively
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Thousands of voters across Edo State turned out on Saturday to elect chairmen in the state’s 18 local government areas and 192 ward councillors, as Governor Monday Okpebholo hailed the exercise as peaceful and orderly. The election recorded impressive voter turnout in many communities, with se

item.title: Best Of The Best: All 100 Participants In 1xCup 2026 Are Known
item.dc:creator: Completesports
item.description: Nigeria’s biggest grassroots event kicks off on July 23. The application period has officially closed, and 1xBet has announced the 100 teams that will compete in the new 1xCup season. Experienced teams, already accustomed to the pressure of big matches, and daring newcomers will fight for the title

item.title: BREAKING: South Africa midfielder, Jayden Adams dies after playing at 2026 World Cup
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: South Africa midfielder, Jayden Adams, has died at the age of 25. The sad news was confirmed by the South African Football Players Union, SAFPU. SAFPU said it was “devastated by the untimely passing” of the midfielder. Adams played in three of Bafana Bafana’s matches at the 2026 World Cup. Ada

item.title: Ayo Edebiri, Joy Sunday Earn 2026 Emmy Nominations, Celebrating Nigerian Heritage
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Nigerian heritage is being celebrated on the global stage after actresses Ayo Edebiri and Joy Sunday earned nominations at the 2026 Primetime Emmy Awards. The nominations, announced by the Academy of Television Arts & Sciences, highlight the growing influence of actors of Nigerian descent in Ame

item.title: Summer travel season is here: Make this vital purchase before your next vacation
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: 8 things I learned about travel expenses after a family tragedy

item.title: Aiyedatiwa Commends Tinubu, Security Agencies Over Rescue Of Kidnapped Oyo Pupils, Teachers
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: Ondo State Governor, Lucky Aiyedatiwa has commended President Bola Tinubu and security agencies for the successful rescue of the pupils and teachers abducted in Oyo State, describing the operation as a victory for Nigeria’s security architecture. In a statement issued on Saturday by his Chief

item.title: Where to put cash right now: Should you lock in at 4% — or wait for the next Fed rate decision?
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: CD rates are at a standstill, but that could change after the next Fed meeting, or the one after that.

item.title: Victor AD and Babyboy AV pair up for 'Level'
item.dc:creator: NotJustOk
item.description: Two generations of elite street-pop and Afropop hitmakers collide as Victor AD joins forces with Babyboy AV for a motivating new single titled Level. The track stands out as a highly emotive, mid-tempo tune that beautifully documents the struggles, triumphs, and psychological resilience of the every

item.title: ‘Read before you attack,’ Atiku blasts presidency over Oyo rescue silence allegation
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: "It is astonishing that a presidency with limitless public resources could accuse someone of silence without carrying out the most basic verification. Either they failed to read our statement because they were too lazy to do so, or they deliberately ignored it because it exposed uncomfortable truths

item.title: Makinde visits rescued Oriire pupils, promises full briefing on kidnap saga
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: Oyo State Governor, Seyi Makinde, has announced that he will deliver a nationwide address next week to provide a detailed account of the abduction and rescue of pupils and teachers from Oriire Local Government Area, following his visit to the victims at the Military Hospital in Ibadan. The post Maki

item.title: Climate change: Women paying the price of a hotter planet
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: Prolonged heatwaves are an ecological issue, a public health issue, and a social issue. With every 1°C rise in temperature, incidents of domestic violence increase by 4.7%. We discuss this issue with our guest Adéa Guillot, Director of Engagement at CARE France.

item.title: Timaya and Duncan Mighty reunite for 'Kontrol'
item.dc:creator: NotJustOk
item.description: In an absolute treat for fans of classic, foundational Afrosounds, Nigerian and Niger Delta heavyweights Timaya and Duncan Mighty reunite for a blazing new single titled Kontrol. Released via DM Records and ONErpm, the track marks a historic link-up between two of Port Harcourt’s most legendary expo

item.title: President Federation Cup: Nasarawa Amazons Beat Heartland Queens On Penalties To Win Women’s Title
item.dc:creator: Completesports
item.description: Nasarawa Amazons were crowned champions of the 2026 Nigeria Women’s President Federation Cup after edging Heartland Queens 6-5 on penalties in a thrilling final at the Stephen Keshi Stadium, Asaba on Saturday. The victory earned the Lafia-based club their third President Federation Cup title,

Our Banking Hero of the Month is Faith Onyemowo Godwin, an outstanding First Bank Nigeria professional whose unwavering dedication to fi

item.title: Runtown shares 'SSG (Sounds Of Soundgod)' compilation album
item.dc:creator: NotJustOk
item.description: SSG (Sounds Of Soundgod) is a definitive compilation project by the renowned Nigerian Afrobeats singer and songwriter, Runtown. The 15-track body of work serves as a comprehensive sonic catalog that reinforces his well-earned industry moniker as the "Soundgod." The album acts as a vital retrospectiv

item.title: South Africa World Cup Midfielder Adams Dies At 25

item.description: Jayden Adams' death comes less than a month after the passing of his grandmother, on the eve of South Africa's Group A match against Czechia at Atlanta Stadium. The post South Africa World Cup Midfielder Adams Dies At 25 appeared first on Channels Television.

He warned that Nigeria can no longer rely on population figures from the 2006 census for nationa

item.description: Low voter turnout and the late arrival of electoral officials and voting materials have characterised Saturday's local government election in parts of Edo State. The post Low voter turnout, late arrival of materials characterise Edo LG poll appeared first on The Sun Nigeria.

item.description: Former Chief of Army Staff, retired Lt.-Gen. Tukur Yusuf Buratai, has urged African nations to embrace home-grown solutions to the continent’s worsening security challenges, stressing that stronger regional cooperation and indigenous capabilities are essential to addressing emerging threats. Buratai

item.title: ‘Time for excuses over’ — Kwankwaso demands fresh census after 20-year delay
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Vice-presidential candidate of the Nigeria Democratic Congress, NDC, Rabiu Musa Kwankwaso, has urged the Federal Government to conduct a fresh national Population and Housing Census, saying Nigeria has gone 20 years without the exercise. Kwankwaso made the demand in a statement posted on his officia

item.description: United States President Donald Trump has warned that 1,000 missiles are “locked and loaded” and aimed at Iran, threatening to destroy the country entirely should Tehran act on threats against his life. Trump made the warning in a post on his Truth Social platform, referencing threats to

item.title: Victony drops an incredibly 'SLICK' new single

item.description: Never one to stand still sonically, Victony continues his run of elite genre-bending form with his latest single, SLICK. item.description: The Fulani community in the Kwok, Barkin Ladi Local Government Area of Plateau State, has accused operatives of the Department of State Services, DSS, of intimidation, harassment and infringements of their rights following a spate of raids conducted in the area. A community leader, Yusuf Muhammad, w

item.title: US wants Iran to pledge to stop shooting at ships in Strait of Hormuz
item.dc:creator: BBC News World
item.description: US media say Iran has told US officials an attack on ships crossing the strait early this week was "a mistake".

item.title: ‘Boko Haram uses AI to make bombs, plot operations’
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: "Before, the bomb explosion was not that big, but then they studied it. AI told us what chemicals to put in that made the explosion heavier" The post ‘Boko Haram uses AI to make bombs, plot operations’ appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.title: Iran supreme leader vows revenge for father’s killing
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: Iran's supreme leader on Saturday vowed revenge for the US-Israeli killing of his father and predecessor, hours after President Donald Trump warned against any attempt to assassinate him. So far, the $57m partn

item.title: Atiku Blasts Tinubu Over Silence Allegation On Oyo Schoolchildren’s Freedom
item.dc:creator: The Whistler
item.description: The Presidential Candidate of the African Democratic Congress (ADC), Atiku Abubakar, has faulted the Presidency for alleging that he remained silent following the freedom of abducted schoolchildren and teachers in Oyo State, describing the claim as a deliberate distortion of facts. Atiku, through hi

item.title: Bauchi Tourism Board Reviews Quarterly Performance, Targets Strategic Partnerships
item.dc:creator: ThisDay
item.description: Segun Awofadeji in Bauchi  The Bauchi State Tourism Development Corporation (BSTDC) held its Quarterly Board Meeting yesterday at its Head Office in Bauchi, mapping out a comprehensive strategy to revitalise the

item.title: Buttler, Brook building with bat as England eye world No 1 spot vs India LIVE!
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football

item.title: Investiture: ICAN Ibadan inaugurates Salome Ajayi as 26th Chairman
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: The Institute of Chartered Accountants of Nigeria (ICAN), Ibadan and District Society, has inaugurated Salome Olabimpe Ajayi as its 26th Chairman. In her acceptance speech at the investiture ceremony and inauguration of the 2026/2027 executive committee on Saturday at Jogor Centre, Liberty Road, Iba

item.title: Sam Larry Makes 1st Public Appearance After Surviving Car Accident
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Popular show promoter, Samson Erinfolami Balogun, popularly known as Sam Larry, has been discharged from the hospital after surviving a car accident that claimed the life of his bouncer on July 5. ‎In a video released online, Sam Larry was seen standing upright in a living room with some of his asso

item.title: Indian tourists among 15 killed as speedboat capsizes in Vietnam
item.dc:creator: BBC News World
item.description: Local media say 21 people were saved after the boat overturned in rough seas near an island in south Vietnam.

item.title: Relish The Weekend With These Top 5 Movies
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: It can really be exhausting to search for movies to watch with family and friends over the weekend after a long week at the office, but with New Telegraph’s top 5 movies to relish the weekend, you can never go wrong. You don’t need to worry about which movies to watch or surfing the internet... The

item.title: Kane, Haaland set for blockbuster England vs Norway World Cup quarter-final showdown
item.dc:creator: BusinessDay
item.description: England and Norway face off in a blockbuster FIFA 2026 World Cup quarter-final on Saturday, with the spotlight on Harry read more Kane, Haaland set for blockbuster England vs Norway World Cup quarter-final showdown

item.title: England Battle Norway As Messi’s Argentina Face Swiss In World Cup Quarter-Finals
item.dc:creator: Channels TV
item.description: Since Argentina entered the knockout rounds, frailties have crept in as they were pushed to breaking point by first World Cup debutants Cape Verde and then Egypt. The post England Battle Norway As Messi’s Argentina Face Swiss In World Cup Quarter-Finals appeared first on Channels Television.

item.title: AAUA lecturers begin indefinite strike over unpaid salaries
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: By Dayo Johnson AKURE — The Academic Staff Union of Universities (ASUU), Adekunle Ajasin University, Akungba-Akoko (AAUA) chapter, has commenced an indefinite strike over unpaid salaries. In a notice signed by the chapter Chairperson, Comrade Bolu Oshodi, the union said the decision followed resolut
